category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vibecheck as an AI-powered git commit assistant written in Go.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vibecheck; source_facts.homepage points to the official vibecheck GitHub repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/rshdhere/vibecheck, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states AI-powered git commit assistant written in Go; source_facts.executables lists vibecheck as a CLI executable.
